layers.name: Application Code
layers.description: Python entry point, ThingSpeak REST client, and tests.

layers.name: Reports
layers.description: Research report Markdown files and A4 summaries.

layers.name: Skills and Workflows
layers.description: Local skill definitions and workflow guidance used to create Japanese research reports.

layers.name: Operations
layers.description: Docker, Redmine, SearXNG, manual setup, and project configuration.

layers.name: Architecture Docs
layers.description: Architecture visualization files and planning documents.

tour.title: Project Rules and Purpose
tour.description: Start with AGENTS.md, README.md, and pyproject.toml to understand repository rules, packaging, and the minimal Python project metadata.

tour.title: ThingSpeak Client
tour.description: Inspect the primary Python client, its data models, error types, request handling, and sensor polling helpers.

tour.title: Report Production System
tour.description: Review the skills and workflow documents that define research, formatting, fact-checking, and A4 summary generation.

tour.title: Operations and Local Services
tour.description: Follow the Docker and manual setup documents for Redmine, SearXNG, and local development tooling.

tour.title: Existing Reports and Architecture Views
tour.description: Use the report, plan, and docs files to understand generated research outputs and repository-level architecture documentation.
